query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "n!: i64"
          FROM (
            SELECT recorded_at,
                   row_number() OVER (
                     PARTITION BY target_kind, target_id, field
                     ORDER BY recorded_at DESC, edit_id DESC
                   ) AS rn
              FROM mass_edit_history
          )
         WHERE (rn = 1 AND recorded_at < ?)
            OR (rn > 1 AND recorded_at < ?)
